summary.key_theme: 受惠於數據中心與電力基礎設施的強勁需求，Quanta Services 憑藉優異的財報表現與上調的財務指引，獲得分析師調升評級，市場動能強勁。

bullish.title: Oppenheimer Upgrades Quanta Services to Outperform, Announces $800 Price Target
bullish.reason: Oppenheimer 分析師 Brent Thielman 將評級調升至「優於大盤」，並給出 800 美元的目標價，顯示華爾街對其成長前景的高度信心。

bullish.title: A Look At Quanta Services (PWR) Valuation After Exceptional Quarter And Higher Full Year Outlook
bullish.reason: 公司第一季財報表現優異，且管理層上調了全年財務指引，這是推動股價上漲的核心基本面因素。

bullish.title: 2 Pick-and-Shovel Plays for Major Digital Infrastructure Buildout
bullish.reason: Quanta Services 被視為數據中心與超大規模基礎設施建設的關鍵參與者，長期受惠於數位轉型趨勢。

bullish.title: Quanta Services Inc. (NYSE:PWR) Screens Strongly for High Growth Momentum and Minervini Trend Template
bullish.reason: 符合 Mark Minervini 的趨勢模板與高成長動能篩選標準，顯示股價處於強勁的上升趨勢中。

bullish.title: Why These Three Big Buybacks Are Sending Very Different Signals to Investors
bullish.reason: 公司宣布參與總額 60 億美元的股票回購計畫，顯示管理層對公司現金流與未來價值的信心。

bullish.title: Quanta Adds Supply Chain Veteran Joseph Kim To Guide Execution And Capital Returns
bullish.reason: 任命供應鏈專家 Joseph Kim 加入董事會，有助於強化營運執行力與資本回報策略。

neutral.title: Quanta Services: A Competitive Edge Through Labor
neutral.reason: 文章肯定了公司的勞動力護城河與利潤率，但同時指出目前估值已處於高檔，對後續漲幅持保留態度。

neutral.title: Quanta Services, Inc. (PWR) Presents at Bernstein 42nd Annual Strategic Decisions Conference Transcript
neutral.reason: 公司參與投資人會議，主要為例行性業務說明，未有重大突發性利多或利空消息。

neutral.title: How The Quanta Services (PWR) Investment Story Is Evolving With Recent Developments
neutral.reason: 分析師維持現有目標價不變，顯示市場目前處於觀望與消化近期漲幅的階段。
